name: kite-vpn
description: Cross-platform proxy client with built-in subscription merging

scripts.build: pnpm run build:types && pnpm run build:core && pnpm run build:ui
scripts.build:desktop: pnpm run build:engine && pnpm -w run build && pnpm --filter @kite-vpn/desktop tauri build
scripts.release:beta: npm version prerelease --preid=beta && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:patch: npm version patch && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: npm version minor && git push origin main --follow-tags
scripts.release:major: npm version major && git push origin main --follow-tags
